title: Implement IMAP email ingestion baseline
requirements: Implement mailbox/folder sync with UIDVALIDITY/UID watermarks.
Support scheduled polling and design an optional IMAP IDLE path.
Extract headers, body text, safe HTML text, attachments metadata and hashes.
Analyze body content only when source policy permits it.
Do not store mailbox credentials in repository contracts.
Write runtime artifacts under data/analytics/raw/email/ or data/analytics/normalized/email/ according to retention policy.
